name: RNEPieChart
description: Unified pie chart component supporting all variations: basic, donut, stacked, label, legend, donut-text, donut-active, interactive, and separator-none configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data: single pie (array of { name, value, itemStyle? }) or concentric (array of { name?, radius, data }). Example: [{value: 275, name: 'Desktop'}, {value: 200, name: 'Mobile'}] or [{name: 'Q1', radius: ['0%', '35%'], data: [...]}]

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Radius of the pie. Number (e.g. 100), string (e.g. '60%'), or [inner, outer] for donut. Default: '75%'

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show the legend for slices. Default: true

legendPosition.name: legendPosition
legendPosition.description: Placement of the slice legend: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'. Top and bottom use a horizontal legend with wrapping; left and right use a vertical legend. The pie center shifts when the legend is on the side. Default: 'bottom'

showLabel.name: showLabel
showLabel.description: Whether to show slice labels (name/value on the chart). Default: true

showLabelLine.name: showLabelLine
showLabelLine.description: Whether to show label lines (connectors from slice to label). Default: true when labelPosition is 'outside'

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to emphasize (scale/highlight) the hovered slice. Default: true

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Built-in React Native slice tooltip overlay when renderTooltip is omitted: card (default), compact, kpi, striped, or none to hide the overlay.

renderTooltip.name: renderTooltip
renderTooltip.description: Optional (params) => ReactNode for the RN tooltip body at the pointer. When set, replaces the layout chosen by tooltip. Params: slice name, value, percent (0–100), color, seriesIndex, dataIndex, optional ringName for concentric pies, pointerX and pointerY.

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']
